text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, is that it? You're not gonna console me or
anything?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cause next time, I'm gonna get first place! I'd
rather just have you praise me then!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll shine so bright that I grab everyone's
attention! Teehee. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get cuter, so be sure to look at me
even more, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get cuter, so be sure to look at me
even more, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Good! Keep spoiling me and I'll give you a gold
star!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We look back on today's race together. Her own
biggest critic, Curren Chan won't accept anything
short of perfection.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't be a meanie! There's nothing I can't do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan burns with determination, ready to
take on the next race.
